title: Structure raw request exemption controls
rawUserRequest: 执行项目校准与更新重新校准计划工单 4：将 rawRequestExemption 改为结构化、可审计且 fail-closed 的授权记录，继续循环执行直到全部工单完成。

declaredIntent.summary: Prevent free-text raw request exemption bypasses with bounded policy and trigger evidence.

sources.reason: Canonical controlled Enum, trigger, applicability, and high-risk rules.
Trust Guard raw request signal validation.
Supported and rejected exemption regression coverage.

riskAssessment.reason: The exemption vocabulary and fail-closed boundaries are deterministic and limited to governance validation.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution and this bounded governance change.

preReviewWarnings: Verify unknown, unsupported, high-risk, and missing-source exemptions fail closed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: rawRequestExemption is a structured enum/policy/trigger record, not free text.
Trigger and applicability evidence are controlled; unknown fields and high-risk work fail closed.
Focused tests and trust-layer documentation cover supported and rejected scenarios.

intent.problem: A structured exemption currently checks only some field values, leaving unknown triggers, scopes, and high-risk exemptions as possible bypass paths.
constraints: Preserve four registered maintenance categories only when structured evidence is complete.
Do not weaken fail-closed behavior or add high-risk exemptions.
Keep policy portable and free of personal paths or secrets.
intent.rationale: Make exemption authority explicit, reviewable, and bounded by policy and trigger evidence.

guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized serial execution of the recalibration plan, including this governance policy, validator, test, and documentation Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
